# Crams Creative

> Freelance web developer & designer based in the Philippines, building fast, accessible, high-converting websites, web apps, and brand experiences for businesses. Fixed-price quotes, no upsell.

## Services
- [Services](https://www.cramscreative.com/#services): Web design, web app development, branding, and SEO foundations.
- [Process](https://www.cramscreative.com/#process): How a project goes from kickoff to launch.
- [Why Choose CRAMS](https://www.cramscreative.com/#skills): Tech stack and approach (React, Next.js, Supabase, Tailwind, Framer Motion, Three.js).
- [Work](https://www.cramscreative.com/#work): Selected projects and case studies.
- [Contact](https://www.cramscreative.com/#contact): Get a free, fixed-price quote (reply within 24h).

## Blog — answers to common client questions
- [How Much Does a Website Cost in the Philippines? (2026 Rates)](https://www.cramscreative.com/blog/how-much-does-a-website-cost-philippines.html): Realistic price ranges and the factors that change the quote.
- [How Long Does It Take to Build a Website?](https://www.cramscreative.com/blog/website-timeline-philippines.html): A realistic timeline and where delays come from.
- [Custom Website vs Wix / Squarespace](https://www.cramscreative.com/blog/custom-website-vs-wix-squarespace.html): When a hand-built site pays off vs a DIY builder.
- [Do You Really Need SEO?](https://www.cramscreative.com/blog/do-you-need-seo-philippines.html): When SEO moves the needle and the free day-one wins.
- [Freelance Developer vs Agency in the Philippines](https://www.cramscreative.com/blog/freelance-web-developer-vs-agency-philippines.html): How to choose the right hire.
- [What to Prepare Before Building a Website](https://www.cramscreative.com/blog/what-to-prepare-before-building-a-website.html): A pre-build checklist to save time and money.

## Location & Contact
- Based in the Philippines, working with clients locally and worldwide.
- Get a quote: https://www.cramscreative.com/#contact
